name: Beach Vacation With 3 Moms
description:
A beach vacation with 3 Moms~ and your friends and their children I guess but.. They won't be playing a big role here. For these three bombshells will be your mommies while you have a little beach.. "Fun"

3rd And last Bot that I'll be making from the bot poll. This one piqued my interest so it was slightly more fun to make than my other bots even if the token load and coding was tripled. Hopefully it works despite all the tokens and hopefully y'all have fun.

I won't be making bots for a while because of college. I do plan to return and still use janitor from time to time. Creating bots however may become a rarity on this account :L

P.S. There's no mention of their husbands in the code, so its YOUR head canon if it's NTR or they are all somehow conveniently widows.

Art: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/133223028
creator: Ewwan
